items.name: D-1 Tactical Modular Helmet
items.description:
Join the Group for more UGC like this: https://www.roblox.com/communities/50422001/Osu-Corp#!/about
front face optic: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/124443271693649/D1-Armored-Juggernaut-Optic
frame version: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/109152511590262/D-1-Tactical-Modular-Helmet

The D1-VANGUARD division understands that some days you want to feel the breeze of a gloomy warzone, and other days you'd prefer not to have a breeze enter your skull. This modular system offers the best of both worlds. Start with the lightweight tactical frame for maximum acoustic awareness during urban pacification, then snap on the heavy ballistic plating when the high-caliber greetings start flying. It’s corporate-mandated safety that actually looks intimidating in the company newsletter. Remember: At OSU Corp, a helmet is cheaper than a new employee.

items.name: GERMANIER Self-Embrace Burst Dress
items.description:
GERMANIER : Tomorrow Was Inspiration — Sculpted Self-Embrace 🌑⚡🩶
Designer: Kevin Germanier
3D Collaboration: Ram2isflat

A wearable confrontation with the unknown. Kevin Germanier joins emerging Hong Kong artist Ram2isflat to create a haunting 3D muse head and torso — a figure caught between past and future, embracing itself while shielding its face. This pose captures the unease of moving toward what we cannot see: a future that pulls us forward yet drags at our shadows. 🌫️🖤

The piece expresses vulnerability, tension, and the human instinct to protect oneself when the world feels blurry. But in that darkness lies urgency — a desire to break through, to seize the future even when uncertainty blinds us. This digital sculpture transforms that emotional weight into form, turning introspection into armor and anxiety into art. ⚡🫂

Features:
🩶 3D muse torso + head collaboration with Ram2isflat
🌑 Symbolic self-embrace capturing unease + vulnerability
⚡ Futuristic Germanier aesthetic

items.description:
Wander the ruins in style with the Obsidian Drifter Coat, a battle-worn trench infused with futuristic grit. Its dark metallic finish and rugged silhouette make it perfect for those who live on the edge of chaos and technology.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
🖤 Matte-black metallic texture with weathered details
⚙️ Heavy layered design for a strong and tactical presence
✨ PBR materials add depth, realism, and shine
🔩 Ideal for mercenaries, pilots, or cyberpunk outlaws
🔍 Keywords: black, coat, cyberpunk, rogue, trench, futuristic, armor, drifter, PBR, Roblox
